plan_name: Westmeath County Development Plan 2021-2027 - Volume 1 Written Statement
notes: Chapter 16 = DM standards (pp.457-495 of the 62MB Written Statement). Standards as 'CPO 16.x' objectives. Clean car-parking table captured; 22m separation; 15% open space; density guideline/context-based (no fixed uph table). Rural one-off criteria in core/settlement strategy.
